name: Court of Cards
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>絵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>え</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>札</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふだ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>絆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きずな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control no monsters, or only control "Queen's Knight", "King's Knight", and/or "Jack's Knight": You can Special Summon 1 "Queen's Knight", "King's Knight", or "Jack's Knight" from your hand or GY. You can banish up to 1 each "Queen's Knight", "King's Knight", and/or "Jack's Knight" from your hand and/or GY; draw the same number of cards you banished. You can only use 1 "Court of Cards" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: If you control no monsters, or only control "Queen's Knight", "King's Knight", and/or "Jack's Knight": You can Special Summon 1 "Queen's Knight", "King's Knight", or "Jack's Knight" from your hand or GY. You can banish up to 1 each "Queen's Knight", "King's Knight", and/or "Jack's Knight" from your hand and/or GY; draw the same number of cards you banished. You can only use 1 "Court of Cards" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
